title: gentianella sturmiana
intro: Gentianella sturmiana, also known as Sturm's gentianella or Sturm's gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It is an alpine plant native to the European Alps, and its roots have been used for their medicinal properties, particularly as a bitter tonic and digestive aid. The plant's roots have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including indigestion, bloating, and poor appetite, thanks to its ability to stimulate digestion and improve the absorption of nutrients. Gentianella sturmiana can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its medicinal properties are also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
